articles.title: Brittney Spencer found Bob Dylan in her dressing room. Here’s what happened next.
articles.description:
Spencer very well may be your favorite musician’s favorite musician. And she opens for Bob Dylan in Boston Thursday.

The post Brittney Spencer found Bob Dylan in her dressing room. Here’s what happened next. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Brittney Spencer opens for Bob Dylan in Boston on Thursday, July 15.
Spencer is gaining recognition as a favorite among musicians, enhancing local music scene.
The concert offers Boston residents a chance to experience a rising star live.
